- Why was this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm -w typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @familyco/server test`
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @familyco/web build` (if UI changed)
- [ ] Relevant manual verification completed

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept changes scoped to the request.
- [ ] I updated tests or documentation where needed.
- [ ] I did not change architecture or approval behavior without explicit direction.
- [ ] I verified user-facing changes in the affected runtime.
